items.reason_en: E50 steering hook patched the appended option token instead of the prompt-final token; steering effects were therefore artificially zero. Probe rows are not used from this file.
items.reason_zh: E50 steering hook 错 patch 到追加的选项 token，而不是预测 Yes/No 的 prompt 末尾 token；因此 steering effect 人为为零。该文件 probe/steering 均不作为正式结果使用。

items.reason_en: E48 audit regex falsely treated a valid rounding explanation mentioning 4.6 + 0.1 as truncation. File quarantined and regenerated after regex fix.
items.reason_zh: E48 审计正则把有效的“四舍五入中提到 4.6+0.1”误判为截断错误。该文件隔离，修正正则后重跑。
